indonesian.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Tidak ada peristiwa besar. Kerja lapangan rutin, kemajuan stabil.
indonesian.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Daerah aliran sungai pulih di semua lini. Hulu dingin dan bersih. Aliran utama membawa ikan lagi. Lahan basah berang-berang melakukan pekerjaan dataran banjir. Beginilah pemulihan skala daerah aliran sungai terlihat ketika waktu dan komunitas bersatu.
indonesian.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Sebagian besar komponen membaik. Beberapa masih perlu dikerjakan. Lintasannya bagus dan komunitas terlibat.
indonesian.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Beberapa kemenangan, beberapa celah. Kerja daerah aliran sungai yang nyata jarang seragam; beberapa bagian membaik sementara yang lain mandek.
indonesian.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Kualitas rata-rata rendah dan sedikit komponen yang mencapai ambang pemulihan. Beginilah daerah aliran sungai terdegradasi diam-diam ketika pengelolaan tidak bisa mengimbangi tekanan.
indonesian.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Kondisi awal tampak layak. Gunakan Tahun 1 untuk pemantauan sains warga dan pendidikan, untuk membangun dukungan komunitas sebelum menghabiskannya pada tindakan kontroversial seperti pembongkaran bendungan.
indonesian.what_you_can_do_for_this_component: 🛠 Yang bisa Anda lakukan untuk komponen ini
indonesian.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Grafik tren kualitas tahun demi tahun menurut komponen daerah aliran sungai
indonesian.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ Pendidik daerah aliran sungai AI sedang membaca data daerah aliran sungai Anda...
indonesian.ai_watershed_science_educator: Pendidik sains daerah aliran sungai AI.
indonesian.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Ini bukan orang Wabanaki, bukan koordinator daerah aliran sungai atau hidrolog sungguhan, dan tidak berbicara atas nama bangsa, lembaga, atau organisasi Wabanaki mana pun.
indonesian.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Untuk suara berwibawa tentang kerja daerah aliran sungai Maine, konsultasikan Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, dan Maine Department of Environmental Protection.
indonesian.watershed_steward_maine_campaign: 💧 Penjaga Daerah Aliran Sungai: kampanye Maine
indonesian.watershed_steward_10_year_maine_campai: Penjaga Daerah Aliran Sungai: kampanye Maine 10 tahun
indonesian.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Enam komponen daerah aliran sungai, sepuluh tahun, tekanan nyata Maine: penghalang bendungan, limpasan pertanian, air hujan pinggiran kota, banjir dan kekeringan akibat iklim.
indonesian.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: Aturan umpan balik hidrologis mengikat mereka bersama.
indonesian.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Zona penyangga yang sehat mendinginkan aliran hulu. Lahan basah berang-berang meredam banjir dan membersihkan aliran utama. Limpasan pertanian rendah membiarkan sungai bernapas. Sungai yang terhubung dan teduh membawa kembali migrasi salmon dan alewife.
indonesian.begin_10_year_watershed_campaign: 💧 Mulai kampanye daerah aliran sungai 10 tahun
indonesian.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Bagaimana jika Anda tidak melakukan apa-apa selama 10 tahun?
indonesian.hydrological_feedback_rules_this_year: 🔄 Aturan umpan balik hidrologis tahun ini
indonesian.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Minta pendidik daerah aliran sungai AI membaca data daerah aliran sungai Anda
indonesian.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: Pendidik sains daerah aliran sungai AI membaca keadaan Anda saat ini
indonesian.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Belum ada tindakan tahun ini. Pilih komponen, pilih teknik.
indonesian.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Kondensasi tidak cukup — terlalu hangat atau terlalu kering.
indonesian.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Kondensasi lambat. Presipitasi stabil tapi lembut.
indonesian.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Kelembapan tinggi + suhu sejuk + angkat kuat → presipitasi konvektif kuat.
indonesian.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Sesuaikan kelembapan awan, suhu, dan angin. Widget mengklasifikasikan presipitasi ke salah satu dari empat tipe diskret. Tanpa skor, tanpa pengungkapan — geser dan amati.
indonesian.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Hipotesis (teks bebas): Apa yang memicu badai versus gerimis?
indonesian.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Tahan dua penggeser tetap. Gerakkan satu. Amati.
indonesian.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Temukan dua pengaturan yang menghasilkan tipe yang sama.
indonesian.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Badai nyata membutuhkan kelembapan dan ketidakstabilan. Selidiki.
indonesian.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Saya paham — jelaskan dengan kata-kata sendiri
indonesian.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Jelaskan bagaimana kelembapan, suhu, dan angin bersama-sama menentukan tipe presipitasi.
indonesian.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Catatan desain: penanda presipitasi diskret 4 tipe; tanpa skor laju hujan; tanpa pengungkapan — secara sengaja.
indonesian.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Siklus Air. Pintasan keyboard: 1 hingga 6 memilih tahap, J mengalihkan mode Perjalanan, R U P memilih jalur perjalanan Anda.
indonesian.switch_to_watershed_steward_10_year_ca: Beralih ke kampanye Penjaga Daerah Aliran Sungai 10 tahun
indonesian.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: tunggangi satu tetes dari laut kembali ke laut. Anda akan mulai di laut, menguap, melayang ke awan, jatuh sebagai hujan, lalu memilih jalur di tanah (limpasan sungai, infiltrasi bawah tanah, atau diserap oleh tanaman). Setiap jalur memakan waktu berbeda. Selesaikan lingkaran untuk mencatat perjalanan; 3 lingkaran membuka lencana Perjalanan.
indonesian.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Anda menunggangi molekul air yang SAMA sepanjang jalan — ia berubah bentuk (cair → uap → cair) tetapi tidak pernah diciptakan atau dihancurkan. Setiap tetes yang Anda minum telah bersiklus selama miliaran tahun.
indonesian.choose_underground_infiltration_path_s: Pilih jalur Infiltrasi bawah tanah (pintasan: U)
indonesian.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Jadilah tetes air dan jelajahi seluruh siklus air! Buat pilihan di setiap tahap dan pelajari sains di balik setiap transformasi.
indonesian.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 Air terkonservasi — limpasan + yang meresap ≈ 100% hujan yang mencapai tanah. Tidak ada yang hilang; hanya mengambil jalur berbeda kembali ke laut.

tagalog.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Walang malaking pangyayari. Routine fieldwork, tuloy-tuloy na pag-unlad.
tagalog.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Gumagaling ang watershed sa lahat ng larangan. Malamig at malinis ang mga headwater. Nagdadala muli ng isda ang mainstem. Ginagawa ng beaver wetlands ang trabaho ng floodplain. Ganito ang hitsura ng pagbangon sa antas ng watershed kapag nagkasama ang timing at komunidad.
tagalog.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Bumubuti ang karamihan ng komponent. Ilan pa ang nangangailangan ng trabaho. Maganda ang takbo at nakikilahok ang komunidad.
tagalog.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Ilang tagumpay, ilang puwang. Ang tunay na trabaho sa watershed ay bihirang pantay; bumuti ang ilang bahagi habang nahinto ang iba.
tagalog.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Mababa ang average na kalidad at kakaunti ang komponent na umabot sa recovery thresholds. Ganito tahimik na nasisira ang watershed kapag hindi kayang habulin ng pamamahala ang mga presyon.
tagalog.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Mukhang kaya ang mga paunang kondisyon. Gamitin ang Taon 1 para sa citizen-science monitoring at edukasyon, para makabuo ng suporta ng komunidad bago ito gastusin sa kontrobersyal na aksyon tulad ng pag-aalis ng dam.
tagalog.what_you_can_do_for_this_component: 🛠 Ang magagawa mo para sa komponent na ito
tagalog.component_quality_across_the_10_year_c: 📈 Kalidad ng komponent sa buong 10-taong kampanya
tagalog.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Tsart ng trend ng kalidad taon-taon ayon sa komponent ng watershed
tagalog.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ Binabasa ng AI watershed educator ang iyong watershed data...
tagalog.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Hindi ito isang Wabanaki na tao, hindi tunay na watershed coordinator o hydrologist, at hindi nagsasalita para sa anumang Wabanaki na bansa, ahensiya, o organisasyon.
tagalog.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Para sa mga makapangyarihang boses tungkol sa trabaho sa watershed ng Maine, kumonsulta sa Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, at Maine Department of Environmental Protection.
tagalog.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Anim na komponent ng watershed, sampung taon, tunay na presyon ng Maine: mga harang ng dam, agricultural runoff, suburban stormwater, baha at tagtuyot na dulot ng klima.
tagalog.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: Pinagdudugtong sila ng mga hydrological feedback rule.
tagalog.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Pinapalamig ng malusog na buffer ang mga headwater stream. Pinapagaan ng beaver wetlands ang baha at nililinis ang mainstem. Hinahayaan ng mababang ag runoff na huminga ang ilog. Ang mga konektado at malilim na ilog ay nagbabalik ng paglipat ng salmon at alewife.
tagalog.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Paano kung wala kang ginawa sa loob ng 10 taon?
tagalog.components_at_75_quality: Mga komponent na may 75+ na kalidad:
tagalog.hydrological_feedback_rules_this_year: 🔄 Mga hydrological feedback rule ngayong taon
tagalog.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Hilingin sa AI watershed educator na basahin ang iyong watershed data
tagalog.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: Binabasa ng AI watershed-science educator ang iyong kasalukuyang estado
tagalog.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Wala pang aksyon ngayong taon. Pumili ng komponent, pumili ng teknik.
tagalog.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Kulang ang condensation — sobrang init o sobrang tuyo.
tagalog.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Mabagal na condensation. Tuloy-tuloy ngunit banayad na pag-ulan.
tagalog.strong_condensation_typical_rainfall: Malakas na condensation. Tipikal na ulan.
tagalog.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Mataas na halumigmig + malamig na temperatura + malakas na pag-angat → malakas na convective na pag-ulan.
tagalog.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Iayos ang halumigmig ng ulap, temperatura, at hangin. Inuuri ng widget ang pag-ulan sa isa sa apat na discrete na tipo. Walang score, walang reveal — i-swipe at pansinin.
tagalog.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Hypothesis (libreng teksto): Ano ang nagti-trigger ng bagyo kumpara sa ambon?
tagalog.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Naipit — ipakita ang mga bukas na tanong
tagalog.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Panatilihing matatag ang dalawang slider. Igalaw ang isa. Pansinin.
tagalog.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Maghanap ng dalawang setting na gumagawa ng parehong tipo.
tagalog.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Ang totoong bagyo ay nangangailangan ng halumigmig at instability. Mag-imbestiga.
tagalog.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Naiintindihan ko — ipaliwanag sa sariling salita
tagalog.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Ipaliwanag kung paano magkasamang tinutukoy ng halumigmig, temperatura, at hangin ang tipo ng pag-ulan.
tagalog.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Design note: discrete 4-type precipitation marker; walang rainfall-rate score; walang reveal — sinadya.
tagalog.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Water Cycle. Mga keyboard shortcut: 1 hanggang 6 ang pumipili ng yugto, J ang nagto-toggle ng Journey mode, R U P ang pumipili ng iyong journey path.
tagalog.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: sumakay sa isang patak mula sa karagatan pabalik sa karagatan. Magsisimula ka sa karagatan, sisingaw, lulutang sa ulap, babagsak bilang ulan, pagkatapos pipili ng daan sa lupa (river runoff, underground infiltration, o sinipsip ng halaman). Bawat daan ay tumatagal ng ibang oras. Kumpletuhin ang loop para mag-log ng journey; 3 loop ang nag-a-unlock ng Journey badge.
tagalog.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Sumakay ka sa PAREHONG molekula ng tubig sa buong daan — nagbago ito ng anyo (likido → singaw → likido) ngunit hindi kailanman nilikha o nawasak. Bawat patak na iniinom mo ay umiikot na ng bilyong taon.
tagalog.choose_river_runoff_path_shortcut_r: Piliin ang River Runoff path (shortcut: R)
tagalog.choose_underground_infiltration_path_s: Piliin ang Underground infiltration path (shortcut: U)
tagalog.choose_plant_absorption_path_shortcut_: Piliin ang Plant absorption path (shortcut: P)
tagalog.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Maging isang patak ng tubig at maglakbay sa buong water cycle! Gumawa ng mga pagpili sa bawat yugto at matuto ng agham sa likod ng bawat transformation.
tagalog.ask_a_question_e_g_why_do_clouds_float: Magtanong (hal., Bakit lumulutang ang mga ulap?)...
tagalog.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 Nakaiimbak ang tubig — runoff + ang sumisipsip ≈ 100% ng ulang umaabot sa lupa. Walang nawawala; iba't ibang daan lang pabalik sa dagat.

thai.a_quiet_year: ปีที่เงียบสงบ
thai.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: ไม่มีเหตุการณ์ใหญ่ งานภาคสนามตามปกติ ความก้าวหน้าที่สม่ำเสมอ
thai.watershed_recovery: การฟื้นตัวของลุ่มน้ำ
thai.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: ลุ่มน้ำกำลังฟื้นตัวในทุกด้าน ต้นน้ำเย็นและสะอาด ลำน้ำสายหลักมีปลาอีกครั้ง พื้นที่ชุ่มน้ำของบีเวอร์ทำงานของที่ราบน้ำท่วม นี่คือภาพการฟื้นตัวในระดับลุ่มน้ำเมื่อจังหวะเวลาและชุมชนมาบรรจบกัน
thai.recovering_watershed: ลุ่มน้ำที่กำลังฟื้นตัว
thai.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: ส่วนประกอบส่วนใหญ่กำลังดีขึ้น บางส่วนยังต้องการการทำงาน วิถีดีและชุมชนมีส่วนร่วม
thai.mixed_recovery: การฟื้นตัวแบบผสม
thai.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: มีชัยชนะบ้าง มีช่องว่างบ้าง งานลุ่มน้ำจริงแทบไม่เคยสม่ำเสมอ บางส่วนดีขึ้นในขณะที่ส่วนอื่นหยุดนิ่ง
thai.slipping_watershed: ลุ่มน้ำที่กำลังเสื่อมถอย
thai.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: คุณภาพเฉลี่ยต่ำและมีส่วนประกอบน้อยที่ถึงเกณฑ์การฟื้นตัว ลุ่มน้ำเสื่อมโทรมอย่างเงียบ ๆ เช่นนี้เมื่อการจัดการตามแรงกดดันไม่ทัน
thai.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: สภาพเริ่มต้นดูเป็นไปได้ ใช้ปีที่ 1 สำหรับการเฝ้าระวังวิทยาศาสตร์พลเมืองและการศึกษา เพื่อสร้างการสนับสนุนของชุมชนก่อนใช้กับการกระทำที่ขัดแย้งเช่นการรื้อเขื่อน

thai.ai_watershed_science_educator: นักการศึกษาวิทยาศาสตร์ลุ่มน้ำ AI
thai.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: มันไม่ใช่บุคคล Wabanaki ไม่ใช่ผู้ประสานงานลุ่มน้ำหรือนักอุทกวิทยาตัวจริง และไม่พูดแทนชาติ หน่วยงาน หรือองค์กร Wabanaki ใด ๆ
thai.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: สำหรับเสียงที่เชื่อถือได้เกี่ยวกับงานลุ่มน้ำ Maine โปรดปรึกษา Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts และ Maine Department of Environmental Protection

thai.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: หกส่วนประกอบลุ่มน้ำ สิบปี แรงกดดันจริงของ Maine: สิ่งกีดขวางเขื่อน น้ำไหลบ่าจากเกษตร น้ำฝนชานเมือง น้ำท่วมและภัยแล้งที่เกิดจากสภาพภูมิอากาศ
thai.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: กฎข้อมูลป้อนกลับทางอุทกวิทยาเชื่อมโยงพวกมันเข้าด้วยกัน
thai.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: แนวกันชนที่สมบูรณ์ทำให้ลำธารต้นน้ำเย็นลง พื้นที่ชุ่มน้ำของบีเวอร์บรรเทาน้ำท่วมและทำให้ลำน้ำสายหลักสะอาด น้ำไหลบ่าจากเกษตรต่ำให้แม่น้ำได้หายใจ แม่น้ำที่เชื่อมต่อและมีร่มเงานำการอพยพของปลาแซลมอนและ alewife กลับมา

thai.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: ขี่หยดน้ำหนึ่งหยดจากมหาสมุทรกลับสู่มหาสมุทร คุณจะเริ่มในมหาสมุทร ระเหย ล่องลอยเข้าสู่เมฆ ตกลงมาเป็นฝน จากนั้นเลือกเส้นทางที่พื้นดิน (น้ำไหลบ่าของแม่น้ำ การซึมใต้ดิน หรือถูกพืชดูดซับ) แต่ละเส้นทางใช้เวลาต่างกัน ทำลูปให้สำเร็จเพื่อบันทึกการเดินทาง; 3 ลูปปลดล็อกเหรียญตราการเดินทาง

khmer.a_quiet_year: ឆ្នាំស្ងប់ស្ងាត់
khmer.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: គ្មានព្រឹត្តិការណ៍ធំ។ ការងារភូមិសាស្ត្រធម្មតា ការរីកចម្រើនថេរ។
khmer.watershed_recovery: ការស្តារឡើងវិញនៃអាងទន្លេ
khmer.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: អាងទន្លេកំពុងជាសះស្បើយគ្រប់ផ្នែក។ ប្រភពទឹកត្រជាក់ និងស្អាត។ ដងទន្លេមេមានត្រីម្តងទៀត។ តំបន់សើមរបស់សត្វក្តាមធ្វើការងារនៃវាលលិចទឹក។ ការស្តារឡើងវិញនៅមាត្រដ្ឋានអាងទន្លេមើលទៅបែបនេះ នៅពេលដែលពេលវេលា និងសហគមន៍ជួបគ្នា។
khmer.recovering_watershed: អាងទន្លេកំពុងស្តារ
khmer.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: សមាសភាគភាគច្រើនកំពុងប្រសើរឡើង។ មួយចំនួននៅតែត្រូវការការងារ។ គន្លងល្អ ហើយសហគមន៍ចូលរួម។
khmer.mixed_recovery: ការស្តារចម្រុះ
khmer.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: ជោគជ័យខ្លះ គម្លាតខ្លះ។ ការងារអាងទន្លេពិតប្រាកដកម្រឯកសណ្ឋាន សមាសភាគខ្លះប្រសើរ ខណៈខ្លះទៀតជាប់គាំង។
khmer.slipping_watershed: អាងទន្លេកំពុងធ្លាក់ចុះ
khmer.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: គុណភាពមធ្យមទាប ហើយសមាសភាគតិចបានឈានដល់កម្រិតស្តារ។ អាងទន្លេបាក់បែកស្ងាត់ៗបែបនេះ នៅពេលការគ្រប់គ្រងមិនអាចតាមទាន់សម្ពាធ។
khmer.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: លក្ខខណ្ឌដំបូងមើលទៅអាចធ្វើបាន។ ប្រើឆ្នាំទី 1 សម្រាប់ការត្រួតពិនិត្យវិទ្យាសាស្ត្រពលរដ្ឋ និងការអប់រំ ដើម្បីបង្កើតការគាំទ្រសហគមន៍ មុនពេលចំណាយវាលើសកម្មភាពចម្រូងចម្រាស ដូចជាការដកសេចក្តីទប់ទឹក។

khmer.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: វាមិនមែនជាបុគ្គល Wabanaki មិនមែនជាអ្នកសម្របសម្រួលអាងទន្លេ ឬអ្នកជលវិទ្យាពិតប្រាកដ ហើយមិននិយាយជំនួសប្រជាជាតិ ទីភ្នាក់ងារ ឬអង្គការ Wabanaki ណាមួយឡើយ។
khmer.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: សម្រាប់សំឡេងដែលមានសិទ្ធិអំណាចអំពីការងារអាងទន្លេ Maine សូមពិគ្រោះជាមួយ Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts និង Maine Department of Environmental Protection។

khmer.watershed_steward_10_year_maine_campai: អ្នកថែរក្សាអាងទន្លេ៖ យុទ្ធនាការ Maine 10 ឆ្នាំ
khmer.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: សមាសភាគអាងទន្លេប្រាំមួយ ដប់ឆ្នាំ សម្ពាធពិតប្រាកដរបស់ Maine៖ របាំងសេចក្តីទប់ទឹក ទឹកហូរកសិកម្ម ទឹកភ្លៀងជាយក្រុង ទឹកជំនន់ និងគ្រោះរាំងស្ងួតដែលបណ្តាលមកពីអាកាសធាតុ។

khmer.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 ទឹក​ត្រូវ​បាន​អភិរក្ស — ទឹក​ហូរ + អ្វី​ដែល​ជ្រាប ≈ 100% នៃ​ភ្លៀង​ដែល​ដល់​ដី។ គ្មាន​អ្វី​បាត់​ឡើយ; វា​គ្រាន់​តែ​ប្រើ​ផ្លូវ​ខុស​គ្នា​ត្រឡប់​ទៅ​សមុទ្រ។
khmer.start_water_cycle_quiz: ចាប់​ផ្តើម​កម្រង​សំណួរ​វដ្ត​ទឹក
khmer.generate_ai_quiz_question: បង្កើត​សំណួរ​កម្រង​សំណួរ​ដោយ AI
khmer.ai_generated: 🧠 បង្កើត​ដោយ AI
khmer.study_term_5_rp: 📖 សិក្សា​ពាក្យ (+5 RP)
